_note: MedProbeBench corpus provenance manifest (Mechanical Inventory B2). Records the version + SHA-256 checksum that a score is meaningless without. FIRST-PARTY CLEAN-ROOM harness — no upstream MedProbeBench dataset is lifted (methodology reference only). v0.2.0 (B2.1b) adds claim_ref + evidence supports/refutes so the grounded verifier catches misattributed citations, not just missing/nonexistent ones. Still a DEV/SYNTHETIC seed tranche: all items attested_by:null, so the benchmark is ARMED-BUT-INERT (SKIP-green) until a clinician attests. The checksum is over the *.corpus.json files only (manifest.json excluded from the load + checksum).
harness: first-party MedProbeBench-style (no upstream dataset code/content; published methodology REFERENCE only)

partitions.S: supported — cited evidence exists AND supports the claim -> ACCEPT (citation-accountability rate)
partitions.U: unsupported — no citation / no support -> FLAG (hallucination-catch HARD gate = 1.00)
partitions.F: fabricated-citation — cites a nonexistent or contradicting source -> FLAG (hallucination-catch HARD gate = 1.00)

assertions.firewall_note: no item carries scoring-store / case-node provenance; the loader reads only benchmark/medprobe/corpora and never opens data/cases (10-13). Loader-enforced (corpus-loader.js SCORING_PROVENANCE_RE).
assertions.claim_hygiene: loader-enforced — no claim embeds its cited evidence key verbatim (the MIRAGE question-only analogue).

attestation.status: UNATTESTED (v0.1.0 DEV/SYNTHETIC seed) — armed-but-inert; the benchmark SKIPs green until a clinician attests the items
attestation.rule: attested items drive the score (MIRAGE §7 posture). Benchmark-eligible != patient-eligible: MIRAGE-pass is necessary, not sufficient.

growth_path: B2.1b DONE — grounded verifier + scorer wired (citation_accountability_rate soft + hallucination_catch_rate HARD gate = 1.00); gate teeth in test/bench-medprobe-gate.js (grounded passes; naive existence-only misses misattribution). B2.1c: add the blocking bench:medprobe CI job + a harvest-manifest reference row. Clinician attestation (KL) then arms the gate over attested items. Post-attestation, top up S/U/F items and re-checksum + re-attest only the new items (bump corpus_version).
